validation_results.name: terraform validate
validation_results.command: cd infra/terraform && terraform init -backend=false -input=false && terraform validate

gate_results.log_path: infra/terraform/environments/{dev,staging,production}/terraform.tfvars all exist. providers.tf documents the HCP Terraform remote backend (replacing a prior S3 backend) with a one-time-setup runbook at docs/operations/runbooks/terraform-hcp-backend.md; backend.tf.example present. modules/monitoring/main.tf implements the observability-as-code env-var module (OTEL_ENABLED/OTEL_RESOURCE_ATTRIBUTES). variables.tf:268 declares otel_exporter_endpoint, consumed at main.tf:185 (var.otel_exporter_endpoint passed through) — the variable's own description is explicit that an empty default means 'no collector yet ... No value is fabricated', consistent with this repo's anti-fabrication norms.

definition_of_done_items.evidence: dev/staging/production terraform.tfvars all present and non-empty
providers.tf HCP Terraform backend config + backend.tf.example + docs/operations/runbooks/terraform-hcp-backend.md runbook

definition_of_done_items.criterion: monitoring module provisions the stack; OTel endpoint is a TF output; ai-worker emits traces
definition_of_done_items.evidence: modules/monitoring/main.tf wires OTEL_ENABLED/OTEL_RESOURCE_ATTRIBUTES; otel_exporter_endpoint variable threaded through main.tf. NOT independently re-verified in this backfill: whether ai-worker is ACTIVELY emitting live traces to a real collector right now (that is a runtime/production-observability claim outside what a static repo re-verification can confirm) — the code path exists and is wired, which is what this attestation certifies.

notes: RETROACTIVE ATTESTATION BACKFILL (ENG-OPS-002.R16, remediating GOV-A-001). No canonical attestation.json existed (only task-tracking.json). Primary delivery evidence: PR #286 'feat(infra): terraform SSOT — HCP backend, schema fix, tfvars + monitoring (INFRA-TF-004)' (merged 2026-06-06, commit 906430d0ae75ef4256b8d7495d7083575dce4f4f) — task ID literally in the PR title, independently confirmed MERGED via `gh pr view 286`. Re-verified 2026-07-22 by confirming the 3 tfvars files, the monitoring module, and the otel_exporter_endpoint variable/wiring all exist in the current tree and that `terraform validate` is green. Downgraded confidence explicitly on the 'ai-worker emits traces' clause of the DoD — code-level wiring is confirmed, but whether traces are flowing in a live deployed environment right now cannot be attested from a static repo checkout and is called out rather than assumed.
